name: TestAddConstraint
title: TestAddConstraint
description: Adds an event object or an event text as a constraint. Checks from the Test Service Library are suitable as event objects.
This function can be used within a test case and also on the main test level.

parameters.name: aAuxHandle
parameters.description: Event object, for example a check from the TestService Library. Specified is the handle that is returned when a check is created.

parameters.name: aEventText
parameters.description: Textual name of an event whose occurrence should be monitored. This event can be triggered with the function TestSupplyTextEvent.
Default behavior, entry in test report and setting of the verdict to "fail"
Only an entry in the test report is made, the verdict remains unchanged

In addition to the entry in the test report and the setting of the verdict to "fail," the current waiting point is also aborted. This behavior was introduced for reasons of compatibility with Version 5.0 and should only be selected in exceptional cases since here after each waiting point a corresponding query must be inserted.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
